strategy.name: Digit Analysis OV3
strategy.description: Deriv trading bot configuration using digit analysis. The bot uses OV3 to make trading decisions, stops trading upon encountering UN3, and resumes when OV3 is detected again.

condition.name: OV3 Trigger
condition.description: The bot triggers a buy action when OV3 is detected.

condition.name: UN3 Stop Condition
condition.description: The bot stops functioning when UN3 appears.

action.message: Stopping trading as UN3 has appeared.

condition.name: OV3 Restart Condition
condition.description: The bot resumes trading when OV3 appears again after a stop.

action.message: Restarting trading as OV3 has appeared again.
